description: Pending approvals staged by the daily sync alert email (B32 / R25). Populated by Part B process_approvals.py; read/consumed when Ray replies APPROVE <token> or EDIT <token> from info@liveradiodfw.com. Part A leaves this as an empty scaffold so the schema is committed before Part B writes to it.

schema.title: show title from shows.json
schema.draft: exact draft text as it appeared in the alert email
schema.emailed_at: ISO timestamp when the alert was sent
